mapper.sql: id, pid, name, url, icon, sort, status, remark, create_by, crate_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_menu (id, pid, name, url, icon, sort, status, remark, create_by, crate_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{crateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_menu
id,
pid,
name,
url,
icon,
sort,
status,
remark,
create_by,
crate_time,
update_by,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=BIT},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{crateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_menu
pid = #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=BIT},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
crate_time = #{crateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_menu set pid = #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=BIT}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, crate_time = #{crateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from t_menu
id = #{id} and
pid = #{pid} and
name like CONCAT("%", #{name}, "%") and
url like CONCAT("%", #{url}, "%") and
status = #{status}
order by pid, sort asc
